text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen has come at last, bringing with it
a number of formidable senior participants.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Of those seniors, the racers garnering the most
attention are T.M Opera O—otherwise known as
the Centurial Overlord—and her rival, Meisho
Doto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But Manhattan Cafe's focus lies elsewhere.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Believing her friend is truly in reach, Manhattan
Cafe heads for the track. This could be the end of
a pursuit that started when she was a child.
